Implemented the ARC2 package for `963c33f8`. The rule I used is column-based, not the summary’s corner-placement story: remove the top `3x3` motif, move each motif column independently, let `9,9,1` columns stop just above the first `5` below them, and let all-`9` columns fall to the bottom with the official edge-case adjustments. I discarded the summary hint and documented that in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_963c33f8/notes.md). No new DSL primitive was needed.

Verification passed end to end: `4/4` official examples passed, the build produced `1000` examples, and `1000/1000` generated examples passed the shared generated-example verifier. I also opened the refreshed preview sheet and it stays within the official family visually.
